2026-04-14T07:45:39.3200442Z [hash-debug] Frontmatter text (2075 chars):
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3201506Z ---
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3202161Z description: |
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3203121Z   Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3204892Z   Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3206583Z   gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3207577Z 
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3207856Z on:
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3208466Z   push:
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3209104Z     branches: [main]
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3209846Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3210306Z 
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3210616Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3211095Z 
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3211400Z network: defaults
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3211819Z 
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3212107Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3212849Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3214752Z   create-issue:
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3215450Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3216076Z   noop:
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3216722Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3217510Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3218136Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3219372Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3220829Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3221655Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3222502Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3223475Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3224843Z         actions: write
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3225580Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3226297Z       steps:
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3227015Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3228011Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3228919Z           env:
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3230074Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3231482Z           with:
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3232150Z             script: |
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3233112Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3234575Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3235936Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3237165Z                 return;
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3237883Z               }
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3238272Z 
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3239117Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3240530Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3241570Z 
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3242466Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3244356Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3246019Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3247838Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3249017Z               }
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3249411Z 
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3250089Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3251251Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3252114Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3253128Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3254204Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3255196Z               });

2026-04-14T07:45:39.3272993Z     branches: [main]
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3273863Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3274306Z 
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3274621Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3275082Z 
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3275367Z network: defaults
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3275789Z 
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3276071Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3276789Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3277643Z   create-issue:
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3278308Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3278915Z   noop:
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3279574Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3280345Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3280959Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3282153Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3283750Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3284595Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3285435Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3286363Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3287061Z         actions: write
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3287785Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3288490Z       steps:
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3289197Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3290160Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3291058Z           env:
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3292180Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3293705Z           with:
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3294382Z             script: |
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3295339Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3296580Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3297885Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3299343Z                 return;
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3300058Z               }
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3300442Z 
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3300865Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3302263Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3303277Z 
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3304312Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3305977Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3307631Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3336702Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3337971Z               }
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3338374Z 
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3338912Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3340064Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3340924Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3341925Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3342792Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3343979Z               });
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3344868Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3345708Z 
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3345965Z tools:
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3346577Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3347212Z   github:
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3347845Z     toolsets: [issues, repos]
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3348374Z 
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3348672Z timeout-minutes: 15
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3349743Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3351072Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (2168 chars):
2026-04-14T07:45:39.3374608Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository\n  Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation\n  gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches: [main]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork: defaults\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  create-issue:\n    max: 1\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    dispatch_triage:\n      description: \"Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      needs: safe_outputs\n      output: \"Triage workflow dispatched\"\n      permissions:\n        actions: write\n        issues: write\n      steps:\n        - name: Dispatch triage workflow\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;\n              if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {\n                core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);\n              const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };\n\n              const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });\n              if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {\n                await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });\n                core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);\n              }\n\n              await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({\n                ...repo,\n                workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',\n                ref: 'main',\n                inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }\n              });\n              core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues, repos]\n\ntimeout-minutes: 15"}
